name: cloudnest
description: CloudNest owner Google Drive upload starter

scripts.build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.test: node --check app.js && node --check routes/user.routes.js && node --check routes/file.routes.js && node --check routes/drive.routes.js && node --check config/socket.js && node --check services/activity.service.js && node --check scripts/google-owner-token.js
